title: Baked Sea Bass with Sweet Chili Glaze
description: A Mexican-inspired dish featuring fresh sea bass topped with a sweet and spicy glaze.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the sea bass fillets on the baking sheet.
In a small bowl, mix together the sweet chili sauce, brown sugar, lime juice, olive oil, cumin, chili powder, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the glaze evenly over the sea bass fillets.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh cilantro, if desired.
